    def __init__(self, dim, n_heads, dropout_rate=0.0, bias=False):
        super().__init__()
        assert dim % n_heads == 0
        self.n_heads = n_heads
        self.head_dim = dim // n_heads
        self.qkv = nn.Linear(dim, 3 * dim, bias=bias)
        self.out_proj = nn.Linear(dim, dim, bias=bias)
        self.out_proj.SCALE_INIT = 1
        self.attn_dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout_rate)
        self.resid_dropout = nn.Dropout(dropout_rate)
        
        inv_freq = 1.0 / (10000.0 ** (torch.arange(0, self.head_dim, 2).float() / self.head_dim))
        t = torch.arange(block_size)
        freqs = torch.einsum('i,j->ij', t.float(), inv_freq)
        freqs = torch.cat((freqs, freqs), dim=-1).view(1, 1, block_size, self.head_dim)
        self.register_buffer("freqs_cos", freqs.cos())
        self.register_buffer("freqs_sin", freqs.sin())

    def forward(self, x):
        B, T, C = x.shape
        qkv = self.qkv(x)
        q, k, v = qkv.split(C, dim=2)
        q = q.view(B, T, self.n_heads, self.head_dim).transpose(1, 2)
        k = k.view(B, T, self.n_heads, self.head_dim).transpose(1, 2)
        v = v.view(B, T, self.n_heads, self.head_dim).transpose(1, 2)

        cos = self.freqs_cos[:, :, :T, :].to(q.dtype)
        sin = self.freqs_sin[:, :, :T, :].to(q.dtype)
        
        def rotate_half(x):
            x1, x2 = x[..., :x.shape[-1]//2], x[..., x.shape[-1]//2:]
            return torch.cat((-x2, x1), dim=-1)
            
        q = (q * cos) + (rotate_half(q) * sin)
        k = (k * cos) + (rotate_half(k) * sin)

        y = F.scaled_dot_product_attention(
            q, k, v, is_causal=True, dropout_p=self.attn_dropout.p if self.training else 0.0
        )

            return torch.cat((-x2, x1), dim=-1)

class TransformerBlock(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, dim, n_heads, dropout_rate=0.0):
        super().__init__()
        self.ln1 = RMSNorm(dim)
        self.attn = CausalSelfAttention(dim, n_heads, dropout_rate)
        self.ln2 = RMSNorm(dim)
        self.mlp = SwiGLU(dim, dropout_rate=dropout_rate)

    def forward(self, x):
        x = x + self.attn(self.ln1(x))
        x = x + self.mlp(self.ln2(x))

    def __init__(self, dim, n_heads, dropout_rate=0.0):
        super().__init__()
        self.ln1 = RMSNorm(dim)
        self.attn = CausalSelfAttention(dim, n_heads, dropout_rate)
        self.ln2 = RMSNorm(dim)
        self.mlp = SwiGLU(dim, dropout_rate=dropout_rate)
        # Learnable token shift (time-mixing) parameters for causal context
        self.mix_attn = nn.Parameter(torch.zeros(dim))
        self.mix_mlp = nn.Parameter(torch.zeros(dim))

    def forward(self, x):
        B, T, C = x.shape
        # Shift sequence by 1 token to provide explicit local temporal context
        x_shifted = torch.cat([torch.zeros(B, 1, C, device=x.device, dtype=x.dtype), x[:, :-1, :]], dim=1)
        mix_attn = torch.sigmoid(self.mix_attn)
        x_mix_attn = x * mix_attn + x_shifted * (1.0 - mix_attn)
        x = x + self.attn(self.ln1(x_mix_attn))
        
        # Repeat token shift for MLP
        x_shifted_mlp = torch.cat([torch.zeros(B, 1, C, device=x.device, dtype=x.dtype), x[:, :-1, :]], dim=1)
        mix_mlp = torch.sigmoid(self.mix_mlp)
        x_mix_mlp = x * mix_mlp + x_shifted_mlp * (1.0 - mix_mlp)
        x = x + self.mlp(self.ln2(x_mix_mlp))
        return x
